settings.title: Settings
settings.readOnlyHint: Read-only system information; runtime configuration is managed by the deployment environment

version.title: Platform version
version.desc: Current release of the identity platform

realm.title: Keycloak Realm
realm.desc: The realm is a deployment setting; this is a static note for the current environment, no runtime variable is read

reconciliation.title: Reconciliation policy
reconciliation.desc: Consistency checks between platform facts and the Keycloak projection
reconciliation.highRisk: High-risk reconciliation: hourly (security-related facts such as assignments and disablement)
reconciliation.profile: Profile reconciliation: daily (profile fields such as email and display name)
reconciliation.full: Full reconciliation: weekly (full data snapshot comparison)

baseline.title: Security baseline
baseline.desc: The security baseline checklist is maintained alongside the security design document in the repository, covering authentication, sessions, audit and key management
baseline.item1: Three-layer checks on admin endpoints (sign-in, console role, fine-grained permission) plus the audit hash chain
baseline.item2: Same-origin CSRF checks and Idempotency-Key replay protection for write operations
baseline.item3: Credentials and secrets live only in server-side environment variables, never in frontend bundles
